description: User hovers over the 'In Person' research opportunity card.
frame_description: The cursor rests on the 'In Person' card while the page is static.

description: User scrolls through the list of research opportunities on the Explore page.
frame_description: The list of opportunity cards moves vertically as the user browses.

description: User pauses on the 'Sessions to schedule' section of the Explore page.
frame_description: The page remains still as the user examines the 'Sessions to schedule' header and cards.

description: User clicks the filter icon in the top right corner.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the filter icon just before the modal appears.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal overlay appears on the screen.
frame_description: A modal with various filtering options (Task Type, Duration, Pay Rate) is displayed over the Explore page.
